summary: Iteration 23 — Email case-insensitivity (register/login/board-invite) + 'Share this board' UX. Backend: 7/7 pytest pass. Frontend: dialog renders 'Share this board' + 'Share' button, suggestions appear on open with 'Your team' header, header switches to 'Matching people' on typing, click-to-share works (toast + member added). TeamPage shows pragati.y & parminder.s under Active Members (24), not Pending (7).

issues: DialogContent missing aria-describedby (a11y warning emitted by Radix). Non-blocking but should add a Description for screen readers.

passing: TestRegisterLowercase::test_register_stores_lowercase — Mixed.Case@Example.COM stored as lowercase; login works with mixed/lower/UPPER variants
TestBoardInviteCaseInsensitive::test_invitee_added_to_board_member_ids — pragati.y user_id present in Pipeline board.member_ids
TestRegisterFlipsInvitedToActive::test_register_flips_only_target_invitee — Iteration-21 $elemMatch regression: target flipped invited→active, all sibling members unchanged (status + user_id intact)

details.suggestions_on_open: data-testid='invite-suggestions' visible immediately, header='Your team', 10 suggestions, current user (testuser@acuity.com) excluded
details.filter_typing: Typing 'admin' switches header to 'Matching people' with 1 filtered match
details.filter_clear: Clearing input reverts header back to 'Your team'
details.click_to_share: Clicking suggestion for uitest_5320@acuity.com fired POST /api/boards/{id}/invite, success toast 'Invited! uitest_5320@acuity.com has been added to this board' shown, member appeared in invited list
details.team_page_active_block: Active Members (24) section contains pragati.y@acuityprofessional.com AND parminder.s@acuityprofessional.com
details.team_page_pending_block: Pending Invitations (7) section does NOT contain pragati.y or parminder.s — backfill verified

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add aria-describedby / DialogDescription to Share this board dialog to silence Radix a11y warning (not user-visible).
OPTIONAL: Inviting an email that's already a board member currently still hits the API and returns 200 (idempotent push is a no-op). Consider client-side short-circuit for clarity, but harmless.

OPTIONAL CLEANUP: Test artifact users (uitest_, autotest_, test_outsider_, TEST_*) created across iterations are now lowercased — they remain in the users collection. Safe to leave; can be purged via DELETE /api/auth/users/delete-by-domain in a maintenance window.

REVERT NOTE: During click-to-share testing, uitest_5320@acuity.com was added to Pipeline board and then removed via remove-member-{id}. Pipeline board.member_ids should be back to its pre-test state. Pragati/Parminder were already members from previous iterations (per spec — DO NOT remove).
critical_code_review_comments: auth_routes.register/login: email normalization via .strip().lower() — correct, but the schema (UserCreate) does not enforce EmailStr pre-normalization. Acceptable since handler normalizes, but adding a Pydantic validator would prevent any future bypass route.
board_routes.invite_to_board: case-insensitive regex with re.escape — correct. Anchored ^...$ so no partial matches. Good.

board_routes.invite_to_board: still calls send_email(email, ...) with the inviter-typed casing rather than invited_user['email']. Cosmetically the recipient sees their own typed casing in From-header rendering. Minor — recommend using invited_user['email'] for consistency.
auth_routes.register: $elemMatch fix from Iteration 21 verified again — no sibling corruption (TestRegisterFlipsInvitedToActive PASS).

InviteToBoardDialog.jsx: searchUsers depends on `members` via useCallback closure; the second useEffect re-runs searchUsers(email) when members change — correct, prevents stale member exclusion. Good React-hook discipline.
InviteToBoardDialog.jsx: setShowSuggestions(false) on blur with a 200ms timeout — works, but pickSuggestion uses onMouseDown.preventDefault() to avoid blur race. Good.

InviteToBoardDialog.jsx: when typed query matches an existing board member only, suggestions become empty and the dropdown collapses (data-testid='invite-suggestions' not in DOM). Acceptable — typing 'pragati' on Pipeline board returned 0 because pragati is already a member. UX could be improved with an 'already a member' inline hint.
auth_routes.users/search: also lowercases query implicitly via $regex options 'i' — consistent.
seed_data_creation: TestRegisterLowercase creates one TEST_Mix.Case_<rand>@example.com user (lowercased). TestRegisterFlipsInvitedToActive creates one TEST_reg_<rand>@example.com user. Both are harmless idempotent test artifacts. Click-share Playwright test added uitest_5320@acuity.com to Pipeline board.member_ids and immediately removed it — no net change.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 23 clean. Re-run /app/backend/tests/test_iteration23_email_case_insensitive.py for regression. Email normalization is enforced at register/login; board invite uses case-insensitive ^...$ regex. Pragati and Parminder are confirmed Active members of Acuity-Professional team and member_ids of Pipeline board (80443bd5-...). Do NOT add Pydantic EmailStr without preserving the .lower() normalization. Iteration 21 $elemMatch regression still passes.
rca_of_the_issue: Original bug: case-sensitive email matching at three layers — (a) auth/register stored email verbatim, (b) auth/login used exact-match find, (c) board invite did exact-match find. Users typed 'Pragati.Y' in invite which never matched stored 'pragati.y'. Fixes: (1) register & login now strip+lowercase before storing/lookup, (2) board invite uses ^re.escape(email_lower)$ with $options:'i' regex, (3) backfill script lowercased existing users + Acuity-Professional team members. All three layers validated.
